description: Endpoint behavior changed from synchronous to async with new response format, but API docs still describe the old synchronous behavior

input.diff:
diff --git a/src/api/routes.py b/src/api/routes.py
index 4d5e6f7..c0d1e2f 100644
--- a/src/api/routes.py
+++ b/src/api/routes.py
@@ -30,10 +30,16 @@ from .tasks import process_report_async
 @app.route('/api/v2/reports', methods=['POST'])
 @require_auth
 def create_report():
-    """Generate a report synchronously."""
+    """Queue a report for async generation."""
     payload = request.get_json()
-    report = generate_report(payload['type'], payload['filters'])
-    return jsonify(report.to_dict()), 200
+    task_id = process_report_async.delay(
+        report_type=payload['type'],
+        filters=payload['filters'],
+        requester=g.current_user.id
+    )
+    return jsonify({
+        'task_id': str(task_id),
+        'status_url': f'/api/v2/reports/status/{task_id}'
+    }), 202
diff --git a/docs/api/reports.md b/docs/api/reports.md

--- a/docs/api/reports.md
+++ b/docs/api/reports.md
